prompt: Modify the "Trending" section to display global weather patterns using static icons.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the "San Francisco trends" section on the right side of the Twitter interface, replace the existing list of trending topics with a display of global weather patterns. Each item in this section should feature a city or region name, its current temperature, and a corresponding static weather icon (e.g., sun, cloud, rain, or snow) representing the local conditions.
objects: Right side panel of Twitter interface
List of global weather pattern entries
City or region names in the weather list
Current temperatures in the weather list
Static weather icons (e.g., sun, cloud, rain, snow) in the weather list
Existing list of trending topics (should not be present)
